dataFolderName.description: Data folder name for per-variant isolation. Controls both the Halo config directory (~/.{dataFolderName}/) and Electron userData directory. Defaults to 'halo' when omitted.

url.description: URL for generic provider (empty string = disabled)

owner.description: GitHub repository owner (required for github provider)

repo.description: GitHub repository name (required for github provider)

browserPolicy.description: Browser network access policy. Controls which domains the embedded browser can navigate to. Omit for unrestricted access (default).

mode.description: Policy mode: allowlist = only listed domains allowed, blocklist = listed domains blocked, unrestricted = no restrictions

allowlist.description: Domain patterns to allow (e.g. "*.example.com", "intranet.corp.com"). Used when mode is "allowlist".

blocklist.description: Domain patterns to block. Used when mode is "blocklist".

homepage.description: Default homepage URL for new browser tabs. Falls back to about:blank when policy is active but homepage is not set.

telemetry.description: Telemetry configuration (enterprise/custom builds only). Controls which user-authored / user-identifiable fields may be forwarded to the self-hosted telemetry backend. Omit for open-source builds — every sensitive field is dropped by default.

allowedSensitiveFields.description: Whitelist of SENSITIVE_KEYS property names permitted to be sent. Recognized keys: specId, spaceName, modelName, sourceName, mcpId, skillId, imBotName, inputTokens, outputTokens, errorCode.

builtinApps.description: Built-in digital humans bundled with the build (VSCode-style built-in extensions). Each entry is materialized into resources/builtin-apps/<specId>/ at build time by scripts/sync-builtin-apps.mjs and auto-installed on first launch by the App Manager. Open-source builds typically omit this field; enterprise builds (e.g. product.<variant>.json) declare their own list pointing to a private SSOT repository.

sourcePath.description: Path to the external SSOT directory containing each built-in app folder. Resolved relative to product.json's directory (i.e. project root). Each entry's specId must match a subdirectory containing spec.yaml and an optional skills/ directory. May be overridden at build time via the HALO_BUILTIN_APPS_SOURCE environment variable.

apps.description: List of built-in apps to bundle. The order has no functional meaning.

specId.description: Subdirectory name inside sourcePath. Becomes the canonical spec identifier.

spaceId.description: Target space for installation. Use 'halo-temp' for the default temp space, or null for global scope. Defaults to 'halo-temp'.

defaultStatus.description: Initial status when first installed. Use 'paused' for apps that require user configuration or browser login before they can run safely. Defaults to 'paused'.
